properties.center_point_reason: Station-centered gateway and hotel district around Shinagawa Station.
properties.boundary_notes: Use a compact polygon covering the main station access area, hotel concentration, and immediate visitor-facing commercial zone. Exclude broad residential and logistics edges.

properties.center_point_reason: Station-centered mixed-use urban activity area around Oimachi Station.
properties.boundary_notes: Capture the station surroundings, retail streets, dining streets, and commercial complexes within a short walking range. Exclude wide residential and industrial edges.

properties.center_point_reason: Landmark-centered walking zone linking Tokyo Tower, Shiba Park, and immediate heritage context.
properties.boundary_notes: Cover the main visitor routes between Tokyo Tower, Shiba Park, and nearby heritage assets that form one walkable experience. Exclude surrounding broad office areas.

properties.center_point_reason: Visitor-facing waterfront leisure core rather than the entire reclaimed island area.
properties.boundary_notes: Include the main promenade, attractions, leisure malls, and park edges commonly experienced as one trip area. Exclude remote infrastructure and detached facilities.
